productDisplayName: Arrow Men Charcoal Flat Front Trousers
description: Composition Textured charcoal grey flat front trousers made of 80% polyester and 20% viscose, two pockets on the sides, two welt pockets on the back, button and zipper, belt loops at the waistband and extended hems Fit Slim Wash care Machine wash warm with like colours Do not bleach or dry clean Tumble dry low Warm iron Do not iron on decorations arrow is known for its no nonsense, classic formal wear for men. This easy to wear, eternally in vogue pair balances conservative class with experimental modernism perfectly. Wear this with crisp formal shirts and a tonal blazer for dressy dos. Model statistics Product is a size 32 on a model of height 6' and waist 32"
